subcodes.first_line: Your letter has been received, and the afflictions which have befallen you have given rise to sorrow and grief [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: نامه شما رسید و از مصائبیکه بر شما وارد حزن و الم رخ نمود و سبب تاسف و تحسر
subcodes.subjects: @consolation and comfort, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering
